title: テイオー、ウマドルになる！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to deliver an application to the
director when...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for coming out to see our show! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Thank youuu! This performance is still just getting
started, so stick around and listen, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, Trainer! If you're free, why don't you
check out our show?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You may have seen me sing and dance before,
but it feels totally different out here, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! And this your one and only chance to see
the Falco Teio duo perform! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm just standing in for someone, so this special
concert is today only!
choice_data_list: I'll stay for a few songs.
I've got stuff to do, sorry.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, stand over there! That's the best angle to
see me from!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Feast your eyes! Not only am I an amazing
Umamusume, but I'm also an amazing Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey! I'm amazing too, you know!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Love, love! ☆ Kiss! ☆ Love, kiss, kiss! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! Love, love! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their performance is fantastic and the audience is
enthralled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dancing and singing for an audience makes for
great practice for Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That was amazing! ♪ They all seemed to love it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That was so fun! If you ever need someone
to sub in again, I'm ready!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: For sure, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if you want, you could also join us as an
Umadol—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Teio? Teio, where'd you go?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before she could hear Smart Falcon's proposal,
Tokai Teio spots Symboli Rudolf and darts off
after her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're not gonna watch me?! It's my first Umadol
concert, though!
choice_data_list: I have to submit an application to the director.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Booo! What's more important? Me or paperwork?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Teio. We're doing this for our fans,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, fine. But don't come crawling back to me
when you regret it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I only meant to deliver the documents, but I end
up chatting for a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Tazuna sees me off, I leave the director's
office and...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! It's me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I really wanted you to see my Umadol
performance!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I had my friend record the concert! That way we
can both watch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget to give me a bunch of compliments
after! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her street concert and flood her with
praise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dancing and singing for an audience makes for
great practice for Tokai Teio.
